ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2022 Continued To Feb-07-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Defendants Motion To Quash Service And/Or Strike Complaint For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction [C.C.P. 418.10]
Off Calendar Nov-21-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Marwan Sanoufi, 858.868.5000 of Pinnacle Legal, P.C. appaering via Courtcall for Defendants Barbary Coast Living and Sarah Hayek.
No other appearances.

Hearing held. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: NOTICE OF MOTION FOR DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE AND/OR STRIKE COMPLAINT FOR LACK OF PERSONAL JURISDICTION is DENIED. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that one of the Plaintiff's status as a suspended corporation deprives the Court of jurisdiction over the defendants. Any arguments regarding Plaintiff's status, Plaintiff's standing, statute of limitations, etc. must be brought via an appropriate motion under the Code of Civil Procedure. Motion to Quash is not such motion. The Court notes that Plaintiff's complaint fails to allege any facts that San Francisco is the proper venue for this case. In fact, Complaint expressly alleges that the proper venue is County of Los Angeles. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service And/Or Dismiss Action For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction [C.C.P 418.10]
Off Calendar Aug-01-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SARAH HAYEK and BARBARY COAST LIVING's Motion To Quash Service And/Or Dismiss Action For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction [C.C.P 418.10] is DENIED. No authority is cited for the proposition that a motion to quash is the proper motion to address standing, capacity to sue or statute of limitations. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)
